feed.title: Example Atom Feed (Parser Fixture)
feed.subtitle: This fixture combines Atom-specific link edge cases and fallback behavior in one feed. Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit, sed do eiusmod tempor incididunt ut labore et dolore magna aliqua.

entry.title: Case A: Prefer rel=alternate over rel=self
entry.summary: Expected result: parser uses alternate article URL. Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit, sed do eiusmod tempor incididunt ut labore.

entry.title: Case B: Missing link, HTTP id fallback
entry.summary: Expected result: parser falls back to id as article URL. Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit. Maecenas sed diam eget risus varius blandit sit amet non magna.

entry.title: Case C: Missing usable URL
entry.summary: Expected result: no active article link can be rendered. Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit, sed do eiusmod tempor incididunt ut labore et dolore magna aliqua.
